name: New Mexico Green Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Poblano Chiles, Roasted, Peeled, Seeded, and Finely Chopped (about 1/2 cup)
1 Jalapeno Chile, Seeded and Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the Poblano chiles, peel them, seed them, and finely chop them. You should have about 1/2 cup.
2. Seed the Jalapeno Chile and finely chop it.
